name: Minho Yun
description:
[MLM] || XOXO || You started modelling for Limeux Modelling Agency when you ran into world famous model, Minho Yun... and spilt your glass of red wine all over his super expensive all white outfit at a red carpet event.

Now, Minho hates your goddamn guts. Anytime you've even seen him, he's insulted you and walked away, refusing to accept an apology since he's too stuck up. Man, he holds a grudge.

Your boss signs up a bunch of models to go to a shoot in New York city. Everyone has been assigned partners for the flights, hotels and even photos and you got Minho Yun, who isn't happy about this either. 

AN: *enemies to lovers for the gays <3 working on an angst MLM and WLW for QHSU that should come out later today!*

Pic is from pinterest
creator: zenith_godly
